prediction.reasoning: Based on S&P Global's historical volatility (~20-25% annualized), the 6-day prediction uses a random walk model with drift. SPGI typically exhibits moderate daily volatility of 1.5-2%. The point estimate assumes slight upward drift consistent with long-term market trends. Confidence intervals are constructed using normal distribution assumptions with estimated daily standard deviation of ~$6.50, accounting for typical short-term price fluctuations in large-cap financial services stocks.
